Event: Royal Challenge - Season 29
Event Date: 01/09/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AM112
Rescue Star Amulet

For the duration of the battle, every 3 sec, the unit throws a candy at the ally with the lowest current health. The candy restores 35% health.
Once in a while, the unit goes into a candy frenzy for 6 sec and starts throwing candy every 1,5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
